text.title: refactoring-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for refactoring-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Public-API rename without a deprecation alias: renaming an exported symbol in the same commit as the feature work.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Breaks downstream callers; needs a deprecation shim for one release cycle and a CI rule blocking re-export removal.

failure-mode.description: Big-bang refactoring: changing many patterns in one commit.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Impossible to bisect; code review becomes meaningless.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents claim behavior preservation while introducing subtle off-by-ones (rounding, datetime, encoding).

failure-mode.description: Over-abstraction: introducing a Strategy class for a 3-branch conditional.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Abstraction debt exceeds the original debt; force a 4-branch minimum rule in the prompt.

failure-mode.description: Type-hint pollution: agent adds Optional[str] where None was already a contract violation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Masking real bugs; require all new type hints be backed by tests that verify the None case.

failure-mode.description: Cross-repo callers: monorepo-wide renames miss tests in sibling packages and dynamically-imported strings.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use Sourcegraph batch changes or git grep validator.

failure-mode.description: Decimal vs float in Python: agent freely converts between them; mixing yields TypeErrors at runtime.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Distinguish semantically (currency vs measurement); constrain the prompt to never convert without explicit type coercion.

failure-mode.description: Snapshot tests: refactors break snapshot tests for cosmetic reasons (output ordering, whitespace).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Distinguish behavior-preserving snapshot updates from regressions.
